import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
os.chdir\('C:/Users/petitd/Desktop/Dev/apafix'\)

from xml_utils import parse_xml_to_structured_data, FORM_LABEL_MAP
from forms import create_dynamic_form_class

with open\('exemple.xml', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    xml_content = f.read\(\)

data = parse_xml_to_structured_data\(xml_content\)

from app import create_app
app = create_app\(\)
with app.app_context\(\), app.test_request_context\(\):
    DynamicForm = create_dynamic_form_class\(data, FORM_LABEL_MAP\)
    form = DynamicForm\(\)
    
    pe_form = getattr\(form, 'ProceduresExperimentales'\).form
    expl_form = getattr\(pe_form, 'ExplicationsProcedures'\).form
    proc_list = getattr\(expl_form, 'Procedure'\)
    print\(f'Procedure entries: {len\(proc_list.entries\)}'\)
    
    first_proc = proc_list.entries[0].form
    dd_form = getattr\(first_proc, 'DescriptionDetaillee'\).form
    
    from wtforms import Field
    dd_fields = sorted\([n for n in dir\(dd_form\) if isinstance\(getattr\(dd_form, n, None\), Field\)]\)
    print\(f'DescriptionDetaillee fields: {dd_fields}'\)
    
    dv_form = getattr\(first_proc, 'DevenirAnimaux'\).form
    dv_fields = sorted\([n for n in dir\(dv_form\) if isinstance\(getattr\(dv_form, n, None\), Field\)]\)
    print\(f'DevenirAnimaux fields: {dv_fields}'\)
    
    print\('Form creation OK!'\)
")
